scripts.build: npm run build -w @adhd-code-focus/core && npm run build -w adhd-code-focus-webview && npm run build -w adhd-code-focus
scripts.test: npm run build -w @adhd-code-focus/core && npm run test -w @adhd-code-focus/core && npm run test -w adhd-code-focus-webview && npm run test -w adhd-code-focus
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @adhd-code-focus/core && npm run typecheck -w adhd-code-focus-webview && npm run typecheck -w adhd-code-focus
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w adhd-code-focus
